response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (not fluent as required), and the resume portrays a senior/full-stack engineer, not an entry-level candidate willing to grow in an insurance-sector agile team.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern technologies and architectures
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement
Demonstrated expertise in TDD, CI/CD, and agile practices
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not fluent as required
No visible Java project experience despite listing it as a skill
Overqualified and senior-focused profile misaligned with entry-level role
